nasb.text: Nevertheless, the king’s word prevailed against Joab. Therefore, Joab departed and went throughout all Israel, and came to Jerusalem.

esv.text: But the king’s word prevailed against Joab. So Joab departed and went throughout all Israel and came back to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 但王堅持他的命令，約押不敢違抗；約押就出去，走遍以色列各地，然後回到耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 但大卫不听约押的规劝。约押只好出去，走遍以色列，然后回到耶路撒冷，
